title: FFE Designer
description:
FFE Designer

About Us

SCDA is an international practice seamlessly integrating architecture, interiors, landscape and object-making to create holistic spatial experiences that are intrinsically sustainable. With offices in Singapore, Shanghai, Manila and New York City, SCDA has projects in over 80 locations across Asia, Africa, Europe, Oceania, and North America. In parallel, SCDA Lab pioneers social and cultural initiatives, applying research and design to enact measurable change and advance the environmental cause.

The Role

We are seeking a motivated FF&E Designer to join our Singapore Interiors team. This role supports the selection, design and coordination of furniture, fixtures, equipment, lighting, artwork and accessories for both hospitality and residential projects. You will assist in preparing design presentations, sourcing materials, and ensuring that every element aligns with SCDA’s refined design language and overall project vision.

Responsibilities

  • Assist in the design, sourcing and specification of furniture, fixtures, lighting, artwork and accessories.
  • Prepare FF&E mood boards, presentation layouts and material palettes that reflect the project concept and design intent.
  • Develop and maintain FF&E schedules, specification sheets and budgets under the direction of senior designers.
  • Coordinate with clients, suppliers and manufacturers to obtain samples, quotations and technical information.
  • Review shop drawings, prototypes and material submissions to ensure quality and design alignment.
  • Collaborate with architectural and interior design teams to ensure FF&E integration with the overall design vision.
  • Organise and maintain the FF&E library, samples and documentation for ongoing and completed projects.
  • Participate in site coordination and installation reviews where required.

Requirements

  • Degree in Interior Design, Interior Architecture or a related field.
  • Min 5 years’ experience in interior design or FF&E roles.
  • Strong design sensibility and familiarity with luxury hospitality and residential interiors.
  • Proficiency in AutoCAD, SketchUp, Photoshop, InDesign and Microsoft Office.
  • Excellent communication and organisational skills with attention to detail.
  • Must be proficient in spoken and written English; Mandarin fluency is an advantage.
  • Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced, design-focused environment.

Application

To be considered, please submit your portfolio showcasing relevant project experience along with your detailed resume. Applications without a portfolio will not be shortlisted.

Please send your application to careers@scdaarchitects.com.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
SCDA is a design studio seamlessly integrating architecture, interiors, landscape and product design to create holistic spatial experiences. Established in 1995 by Founding Principal and Design Director Soo Chan, SCDA was the recipient of three American Institue of Architects (AIA) International (2018) and AIA NY Awards for Architecture (2019); inaugural Royal Institute of British Architects (RIBA) Award for International Excellence (2016); the RIBA International Award for OneKL (2012) and the Lincoln Modern (2003); and the SIA-Getz Architecture Prize for Emergent Architecture in Asia (2006), in addition to nine Chicago Athenaeum International Architecture Awards.

SCDA’s work strives for tranquility and calmness qualified by space, light and structural order. Architectural expressions are distilled, to capture the spiritual essence of ‘place’; while architecture and interior are inspired by the cultural and climatic nuances of context;  integrating landscape, water features and blurring the boundary between inside and out. Spaces are characterized by lush gardens, water courts and air wells, effecting a sensuous engagement with the elements. A sensitivity to the inherent beauty of natural materials is expressed through clarity in construction details, and elemental architectural expression.
postedCompany.name: SCDA INTERIORS PTE. LTD.
